subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise beseemeth and is worthy of that Most Glorious Lord, through Whose Name the praiseworthy station hath been made manifest and through Whose Station [3.5s]... ...O God, my God! I yield Thee thanks for having guided me unto Thy straight Path and enabled me to recognize Thee and turn unto Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از حدود حضرت محمودیرا لایق و سزاست که باسمش مقام محمود ظاهر و بمقامش
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @naming of children; of individuals, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
